mapper.insert:
SELECT "seq_board_no".NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "board" ("board_no", "board_type_no", "title", "board_content", "writer", "created_dt", "delete_flag") VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{boardTypeNo}, #{title}, #{boardContent}, #{writer}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", b."board_content" AS boardContent, u."name" AS writerName, u."profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, NVL(l.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, NVL(c.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "target_id", COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM "likes" WHERE "target_type" = 'board' GROUP BY "target_id" ) l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "board_no", COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM "comment" GROUP BY "board_no" ) c ON b."board_no" = c."board_no" WHERE b."board_no" = #{boardNo} AND b."delete_flag" = 0

SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", u."name" AS writerName, u."profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, NVL(l.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, NVL(c.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "target_id", COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM "likes" WHERE "target_type" = 'board' GROUP BY "target_id" ) l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "board_no", COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM "comment" GROUP BY "board_no" ) c ON b."board_no" = c."board_no" WHERE b."delete_flag" = 0
AND b."title" LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
ORDER BY b."board_no" DESC OFFSET (#{pageRequest.page} - 1) * #{pageRequest.size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageRequest.size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "board" WHERE "delete_flag" = 0
AND "title" LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'

SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", u."name" AS writerName, u."profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, NVL(l.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, NVL(c.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "target_id", COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM "likes" WHERE "target_type" = 'board' GROUP BY "target_id" ) l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "board_no", COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM "comment" GROUP BY "board_no" ) c ON b."board_no" = c."board_no" WHERE b."delete_flag" = 0 ORDER BY likeCount DESC, b."board_no" DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT b."board_no" AS boardNo, b."board_type_no" AS boardTypeNo, b."title", u."name" AS writerName, u."profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, b."created_dt" AS createdDt, NVL(l.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, NVL(c.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount FROM "board" b JOIN "user" u ON b."writer" = u."user_no" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "target_id", COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM "likes" WHERE "target_type" = 'board' GROUP BY "target_id" ) l ON b."board_no" = l."target_id" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT "board_no", COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM "comment" GROUP BY "board_no" ) c ON b."board_no" = c."board_no" WHERE b."delete_flag" = 0 AND b."board_type_no" = #{boardTypeNo} ORDER BY b."board_no" DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "created_dt") AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "created_dt") AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM "board" WHERE "delete_flag" = 0 GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "created_dt"), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "created_dt") ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC
